Advanced Momentum Analyzer

OBV + Sortino + Slope Acceleration | 1401 assets | 2026-03-05  |  market-dashboards
Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-05 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Analyzes 700+ assets using OBV divergence detection, Sortino ratios, slope acceleration, and trajectory classification. Produces signals from STRONG_BUY to SELL with confidence scores. OBV divergence flags price-volume disagreements as early warning signals.
Today's Reading
Today's momentum dashboard shows a market heavily skewed toward bullish signals, with 282 STRONG_BUY and 36 BUY ratings vastly outnumbering the 367 SELL signals across 700+ assets—suggesting selective strength rather than broad market conviction. The top 10 buy candidates are dominated by V-shaped recovery patterns, with 8 of them rated STRONG_BUY at 90% confidence (ACMR, AEIS, AFK, AG, AEM, AIRR, AGI, AIA), indicating the system has detected synchronized price reversals and favorable volume-price dynamics in this cluster. However, the signal distribution reveals a cautionary imbalance: 647 holdings remain in HOLD status and SELL signals outnumber BUY signals nearly 10-to-1, which could reflect either consolidation in most assets or potential early-stage divergences that the OBV detector has not yet flagged as critical. The concentration of high-confidence signals in a narrow group of tickers (mostly starting with A) warrants scrutiny—this could reflect genuine sector or market-cap correlation, or it may indicate the dashboard is detecting a specific technical pattern that is currently widespread. Overall, today presents a mixed picture of localized momentum strength against a backdrop of broad market hesitation.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
